storyInfo: When the gunfire ceases and the screams grow quiet, I'll be back by my mother's side, like when I was born.

attributes.content: 'All units, this is Dispatch.'
'All units, cease fire immediately. We have an urgent request from Deity Grypherburg.'
'Repeat, all units, cease fire immediately.'
'Please acknowledge.'
(Exhales)
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Scope of the ceasefire?
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: All active units.
attributes.name: Radioman

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: 'Acknowledged.'
Inform Lieutenant Yelchin and ensure that all units in the 2nd Division observe the ceasefire.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: 'All units remain on standby. Maintain battle stations.'
'Until the threat is completely eliminated, we shall continue to serve our duty to protect Deity Grypherburg and the people.'
...Summon the quartermaster.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Sir, we do not have a quartermaster for this operation.
attributes.name: Soldier

attributes.content: You expected this to be only a quick response, and that it would not take much time to eliminate the rebellious Infected.
attributes.name: Soldier

attributes.content: Respond to Dispatch as usual.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: And what is your name, soldier?
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Private Vyacheslav Kinov, sir.
attributes.name: Soldier

attributes.content: Very well. Inform the Lieutenant, Private Kinov. Your services are not needed here for now.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: ...You had me leave my post to come to you for this little thing?
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: You're out of your mind.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: Oh, look at you, Patya, all high and mighty in that Shieldguard armor...
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Does that pretty helmet of yours block your sight?
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: The maggots in the rations, bolts that snap like twigs, even duds!
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Is this what they send us out to die with?!
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: If there are maggots in your rations, you eat them with the rations. If the weapons are hard to use, use your bare hands.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: We're soldiers. We fight and win. There are only two ends: Keep fighting, or die.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: You're the one who's out of his mind!
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: If you find that someone hasn't been doing his job, you report to your superior, not complain to me here.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: I'm not the quartermaster—
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: I thought the Defender Regiments were supposed to be on the top deck.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: ...Sorry, sir. I was away from my post.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: I will report this to the commissar myself.
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: (Salutes)
attributes.name: Cold Soldier

attributes.content: S-Sir!
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: What did you find out, soldier?
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Tell me the reason for your anger.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: ...The quality of our supplies and equipment on this operation is exceedingly poor.
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: The rations are insufficient, the cans damaged and filled with maggots...
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Many of the bolts were not made of steel, but crude iron.
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: And the reserve Originium bombs are so weak that they're little more than glorified duds.
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: How are we supposed to proceed the operation with these?
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Why did you enlist, soldier?
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: To...
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Speak up.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: To—to prove myself! I want people to know my name—
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: Like they know yours!
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: They'll know your name when the Army sends your tags back to your mother, and she etches them on a white birch tree.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: No, not like that...
attributes.name: Angry Soldier

attributes.content: There is little room for the individual to choose, when the collective is at war.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Keep this hope in your heart, boy, and your 'discovery' too.
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: For the survival of Ursus and her people, there is only one option...
attributes.name: Officer

attributes.content: Set this land on fire.
attributes.name: Officer
